metadata.name: Handle a New Client Intake Call

description: A potential client calls the firm for the first time. The intake specialist needs to gather initial information.

nodes.task_description: Gather basic information from the caller: name, contact information, and a brief description of their legal issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the initial intake form.

nodes.task_description: Identify the names of all other parties involved in the potential matter for a conflicts check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the names of all adverse parties.

nodes.task_description: Determine which practice area the matter falls into and schedule a consultation with an appropriate attorney.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly routes the potential client and schedules a meeting.
